name: 轉折詞與篇章銜接 (Transition Words & Cohesion)

points: 轉折(前後語意相反)用 however、but、although、though,例:He is poor, but he is happy.,前後形成對立。
因果關係:原因用 because、since;結果用 so、therefore、thus,例:It was raining, so we stayed home.。
遞進補充用 moreover、in addition、besides;舉例說明用 for example、such as,讓敘述更完整。
選詞前先判斷前後兩句的邏輯(相反/因果/補充/舉例),再挑對應類別的轉折詞,不可只看單句。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="6" y="6" width="348" height="178" rx="10" fill="#eef4f2"/><rect x="20" y="40" width="100" height="44" rx="8" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1"/><text x="70" y="66" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e" text-anchor="middle">I was tired</text><rect x="240" y="40" width="100" height="44" rx="8" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1"/><text x="290" y="66" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e" text-anchor="middle">I kept going</text><rect x="138" y="46" width="84" height="32" rx="6" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#c9755c" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><text x="180" y="66" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#c9755c" text-anchor="middle">轉折詞?</text><line x1="120" y1="62" x2="138" y2="62" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="222" y1="62" x2="240" y2="62" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1.2"/><text x="70" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#d98072" text-anchor="middle">相反 however</text><text x="180" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#5aa874" text-anchor="middle">因果 so</text><text x="290" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#f0a52e" text-anchor="middle">遞進 besides</text><text x="180" y="150" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e" text-anchor="middle">依語意亮起連接詞</text></svg>
notes.caption: 先判前後句邏輯,再亮對應的轉折詞。
notes.trap: ⚠ 常見錯誤:看到「然而」就填 however 卻忽略它是連接副詞需用分號;或把 because(原因)與 so(結果)方向填反。

notes.h: 連接詞與連接副詞的差異
points: 連接副詞(however、therefore、moreover)連接兩個完整句子時,前面要用分號或句點,本身後面再加逗號:..., it rained; however, we left.。
從屬連接詞(because、although、while)引導附屬子句,子句不能單獨成句,須與主句連用。
對等連接詞 and、but、so 連接對等的字、片語或子句,前面通常加逗號即可,不用分號。
判別法:該詞能否單獨「黏住」兩個完整句而只靠逗號?能→連接詞;不能、需分號→連接副詞。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="6" y="6" width="348" height="178" rx="10" fill="#eef4f2"/><text x="180" y="30" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e" text-anchor="middle">兩種接法對照</text><rect x="16" y="46" width="328" height="50" rx="8" fill="#f3e7df"/><text x="24" y="68" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">It rained</text><text x="120" y="68" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#c9755c">; however ,</text><text x="222" y="68" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">we left.</text><text x="24" y="88" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#d98072">分號↑</text><text x="150" y="88" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#d98072">逗號↑</text><rect x="16" y="112" width="328" height="50" rx="8" fill="#f3e7df"/><text x="24" y="134" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">We left</text><text x="110" y="134" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#5aa874">because</text><text x="196" y="134" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">it rained.</text><text x="24" y="154" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#5aa874">從屬連接詞引導子句</text></svg>
notes.caption: ; however, 用分號;because 直接引導子句。
notes.trap: ⚠ 最易錯:用逗號把 however 接兩句(逗號拼接 comma splice);或誤以為 although 後可加逗號獨立成句。

quiz.stem: The medicine works very well; ___, it may cause drowsiness, so don't drive after taking it.
quiz.explanation: 前句「藥很有效」與後句「卻會使人想睡」語意相反,且用分號連接兩完整句,須用連接副詞 however(然而)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ therefore(因此)是順承結果、besides(此外)是補充、for example(舉例)皆不符對立關係;別因前後都談藥效就誤填順承詞。

quiz.stem: The flight was delayed for three hours ___ the heavy snow that covered the whole runway.
quiz.explanation: 空格後是名詞片語 the heavy snow,須用介系詞片語 because of(由於);because 是連接詞需接子句。
quiz.trap: ⚠ because + 子句(主詞+動詞),because of + 名詞;這裡後面只有名詞片語,選 because 會缺動詞而錯。

quiz.stem: This laptop is light and fast; ___, its battery can last for over twelve hours on a single charge.
quiz.explanation: 前句列優點,後句再加一個優點(電池久),為遞進補充,用 in addition(此外)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ on the contrary(相反地)用於否定前句、as a result(因此)表結果、in short(簡言之)為總結;此處是「再添一個優點」故用遞進詞。

quiz.stem: Many endangered animals live in this rainforest; ___, the golden monkey and the clouded leopard can still be found here.
quiz.explanation: 後句以兩種具體動物說明前句的「許多瀕危動物」,屬舉例,用 for instance(例如)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ for instance = for example;however(轉折)、therefore(因果)、otherwise(否則)皆非舉例,別把列舉誤判成轉折。

quiz.stem: ___ the team had practiced for months, they still lost the final by a narrow margin.
quiz.explanation: 空格後是完整子句 the team had practiced,須用連接詞 Although(雖然)表讓步。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Despite / In spite of 是介系詞,只能接名詞或動名詞,不能接子句;後面有主詞+動詞,只能用連接詞 Although。

quiz.stem: To make instant noodles, first boil the water, ___ add the noodles, and finally pour in the seasoning.
quiz.explanation: 句子描述步驟順序:first...、___、finally...,中間步驟用 then(接著)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ first / then / finally 是順序連接詞一組;instead(反而)、meanwhile(同時)、nevertheless(然而)皆破壞步驟流程,別被單一連接詞語感誤導。

quiz.stem: Which sentence is correctly punctuated?
options: She was sick, however, she came to school.
She was sick however she came to school.
She was sick; however, she came to school.
She was sick, however she came to school.
quiz.explanation: however 是連接副詞,連接兩個完整句時前須用分號、後加逗號:She was sick; however, she came to school.
quiz.trap: ⚠ 用逗號連接兩完整句加 however 是「逗號拼接(comma splice)」錯誤;漏標點或只用逗號都不對,正解唯有分號版本。

quiz.stem: The bridge was badly damaged in the earthquake; ___, all traffic has been stopped for safety.
quiz.explanation: 分號後連接完整句,須用連接副詞;表結果用 therefore(因此)。so/and/but 為對等連接詞,不與分號連用接句。
quiz.trap: ⚠ so 雖也表結果,但它是對等連接詞,前面該用逗號而非分號;分號後須接連接副詞 therefore,別把 so 與 therefore 的標點規則混用。

quiz.stem: ___ he had little money, he never asked his friends for help, for he valued his independence.
quiz.explanation: 空格後是子句,且只填一個讓步連接詞,Even though(即使/儘管)正確。中文「雖然…但是」在英文只能擇一連接詞。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 英文不可 Although...but 並用(中式錯誤);Despite that 罕用且語意鬆散、However 後須逗號且非引導子句,故選 Even though。

quiz.stem: Living in the city is convenient; ___, life in the countryside is quieter and closer to nature.
quiz.explanation: 前句講城市方便,後句講鄉村安靜,兩種生活對照,用 on the other hand(另一方面)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ in conclusion(總之)是總結、for this reason(因此)表因果、that is(也就是說)是換句話說;唯 on the other hand 表兩面對比。

quiz.stem: You'd better leave for the airport now; ___, you might miss your morning flight.
quiz.explanation: 前句建議現在出發,後句說明「否則」會錯過班機,為假設的負面後果,用 otherwise(否則)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ otherwise = or else,連接「未照做的不良後果」;therefore(因此)順承、moreover(此外)補充、meanwhile(同時)皆不合假設語氣。

quiz.stem: The streets were completely flooded, ___ many people had to be rescued by boat.
quiz.explanation: 前句是原因(街道淹水),後句是結果(須船救援),前因後果用 so(所以)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 若填 because 會把因果方向倒置(變成淹水是因為被救);so 連接「因→果」,別把原因句誤當結果。

quiz.stem: Green habits ___ turning off the lights and recycling paper can make a real difference to our planet.
quiz.explanation: 空格後直接接名詞片語舉例(關燈、回收),嵌在句中用 such as(例如)最自然,不需另起句。
quiz.trap: ⚠ for example 多置句首/句中加逗號分隔成獨立成分;此處緊接名詞當修飾,用 such as 才不破壞句構,別與 for example 混用。

quiz.stem: My brother prefers to save every dollar he earns, ___ I would rather spend mine on travel and books.
quiz.explanation: 哥哥存錢、我愛花錢,兩種習慣對比,while 除「當…時」外亦表「然而/相對」的對比。
quiz.trap: ⚠ since(既然/自從)、as(因為/當)、for(因為)偏原因或時間;此處是兩種做法對照,須用對比的 while,別讀成因果。

quiz.stem: ___ feeling exhausted after the long hike, she insisted on cooking dinner for the whole family.
quiz.explanation: 空格後是動名詞片語 feeling exhausted(無主詞動詞的完整子句),須用介系詞 In spite of(儘管)接動名詞。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Although / Even though / While 是連接詞須接子句(主詞+動詞);feeling 是動名詞,只能用介系詞 In spite of,別把分詞片語當子句。

quiz.stem: A: "The report is due tomorrow, but my computer just crashed!" B: "Don't panic. ___, you saved a copy on the cloud last night, right?" Choose the best transition.
quiz.explanation: B 安慰對方並指出「幸好昨晚雲端有備份」,轉折到正面情況,用 Fortunately(幸好)最貼合語境。
quiz.trap: ⚠ As a result(因此)需有前因、On the contrary(相反地)否定前句、In conclusion(總之)是總結;此處是帶來好消息,Fortunately 才合語氣。

quiz.stem: Look at the chart: sales of e-books rose sharply from 2018 to 2023; ___, sales of paper books dropped steadily in the same period. Choose the connector.
quiz.explanation: 電子書上升、紙本書下降,趨勢相反,用 by contrast(相比之下/相反地)表對比。
quiz.trap: ⚠ likewise(同樣地)表類同方向、consequently(因此)表結果、namely(即)為解釋;兩條趨勢相反須用對比詞 by contrast。

quiz.stem: The new policy cut working hours but kept the same pay; ___, both productivity and morale rose.
quiz.explanation: 前句是好政策,後句是它帶來的結果(生產力與士氣上升),為因果順承,用 thus(因此)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ instead(反而)、nonetheless(儘管如此)是轉折、by the way(順帶一提)離題;此處前因後果一致,須用 thus。

quiz.stem: First, we collected the data; next, we analyzed it carefully; ___, we presented our findings to the committee.
quiz.explanation: First...next...___ 為步驟序列,最後一步用 finally(最後)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ meanwhile(同時)、otherwise(否則)、similarly(同樣地)皆不收尾;序列 first/next/finally 須以 finally 結束。

quiz.stem: The plan was rejected, not because it was too expensive, but because it was unsafe; ___, the deadline was simply too tight.
quiz.explanation: 前句已給兩個拒絕理由,後句再加第三個理由(期限太緊),為遞進補充,用 moreover(此外)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ however/in contrast 是轉折、instead 是「而非」;此處是「再補一個原因」,須用遞進的 moreover,別被句子複雜結構誤導成轉折。

quiz.stem: Which is the best way to combine: "The experiment failed. We learned a lot from it." using a contrast connector?
options: The experiment failed, nevertheless we learned a lot from it.
The experiment failed; nevertheless, we learned a lot from it.
The experiment failed nevertheless, we learned a lot from it.
The experiment failed, nevertheless, we learned a lot from it.
quiz.explanation: nevertheless 為連接副詞,連接兩完整句時前用分號、後加逗號:...failed; nevertheless, we learned...。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 用逗號接兩完整句(選項1、4)是逗號拼接;選項3標點位置錯。唯分號+逗號(選項2)正確,別把連接副詞當對等連接詞。

quiz.stem: ___ the bridge has been closed for repairs, drivers are advised to take the longer route along the river.
quiz.explanation: 空格引導原因子句(橋封閉修繕),建議改道,用 Since(既然/由於)表原因。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Unless(除非)、In case(以防)是條件、Whereas(然而)是對比;此處是「因為橋封閉所以改道」的因果,須用 Since。

quiz.stem: Regular exercise brings many benefits. ___, it strengthens the heart, improves sleep, and reduces stress.
quiz.explanation: 後句具體展開前句「許多好處」(強心、助眠、減壓),用 In particular(具體來說/尤其)引出細節最合適。
quiz.trap: ⚠ On the contrary、Even so、Instead 都帶轉折/否定;此處是把「好處」具體化,屬說明展開,須用 In particular,別誤判成轉折。

quiz.stem: ___ the directions seemed clear at first, we ___ got lost twice before reaching the old temple.
quiz.explanation: 前句「指示看似清楚」與後句「卻迷路兩次」為讓步轉折:Although(雖然)引導讓步,主句用 still(仍然)呼應。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Because/Since...so/thus 是因果且中文式「因為…所以」並用為錯;Unless(除非)語意不通;唯 Although...still 表「雖然…仍…」。

quiz.stem: Notice on a gate: "Please close the door gently ___ the patients can rest without being disturbed." Choose the best connector.
quiz.explanation: 告示說明輕關門的「目的」是讓病人安靜休息,目的副詞子句用 so that(以便/為了)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ so 單獨表結果、because 表原因(方向相反)、such that 須搭名詞;表「目的」須用 so that + 子句,別把目的誤當原因或結果。
